name: @gotong/example-model-routing
description: MR capstone (模型路由 track) — 主模型挂了,管家不断线. The whole deterministic failover chain in one run, no network, no API key: a flaky primary throws before its first token → the RoutingProvider fails over to the backup and the answer still arrives → three failures trip the per-candidate circuit breaker so the 4th call skips the dead primary fast → the SAME events feed the MR-M3 health projection the admin panel reads (you can see WHICH provider is degraded, not just a binary outage) → the primary heals, a half-open probe closes the breaker, and routing snaps back to it. Real @gotong/llm RoutingProvider + @gotong/host RoutingHealthTracker underneath; only the two providers are stubbed.
